chapter_title.ar: باب الصَّلَاةِ خَلْفَ مَنْ لَا يُقْتَدَى بِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 50 – The Salāt behind the one whom one does not follow with Non-Shias)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/255)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/255)

parts.text: إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَمَّنْ سَأَلَ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام )

text: أُصَلِّي خَلْفَ مَنْ لَا أَقْتَدِي بِهِ فَإِذَا فَرَغْتُ مِنْ قِرَاءَتِي وَ لَمْ يَفْرُغْ هُوَ قَالَ فَسَبِّحْ حَتَّى يَفْرُغَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazl Bin Shazaan, from Safwan, from Is’haq Bin Ammar,

(It has been narrated) from the one who asked Abu Abdullahasws, said, ‘I pray Salāt behind the one I do not follow with (Non-Shia), so then I tend to be free from my recitation and he is not free (from it)’. Heasws said: ‘So Glorify until he is free (from the recitation)’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il has narrated from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar from the one who has asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said the following: I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘Can I perform Salah (prayer) behind one whom I do not follow and complete recitation when he has not yet completed?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘Say Tasbih (Allah is free of all defects) until he completes.’”
